name: Baked Apples with Brandy Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 large Baking apples (Rome Beauties, Gold Delicious, and Pippins work well)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Partially core the apples from the stem end without cutting through the bottom so the filling stays in the apple.
3. Butter a 9" x 13" glass or enameled baking dish.
4. Combine the filling ingredients (walnuts, raisins, brown sugar, cinnamon, and lemon rind) except for butter in a large bowl.
5. Layer the filling mixture alternately with butter in the apples.
6. Arrange the filled apples in the baking dish.
7. Bake for 30 minutes or until tender.
8. Meanwhile, prepare the sauce: In the top of a double boiler over simmering (not boiling) water, combine all ingredients except brandy.
9. Cook for 15-20 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened.
10. Remove from heat and stir in brandy.
11. To serve, put some sauce on warmed dessert plates and top with warm baked apples.
